theme: Cascade A micro-patches from live test on a wellness/cosmetic pilot
summary: Live test on a wellness/cosmetic pilot confirmed Cascade A v2.8.0 holds under load — synthesis-first paragraph delivered (stick-solaire pattern), schemas used as analytical vocabulary, zero form-fill recap, zero score, zero missing-fields leak, coherence_check event emitted. Three micro-frictions surfaced and patched. (1) snapshot-brand Step 7: add 'three movements + blank line between each' rule. Movement 1 = what it really is + who buys. Movement 2 = offer architecture. Movement 3 = 1-2 things noticed. Same density, breaks the wall-of-text effect for fast scanning. (2) tour Milestone 3 (blase): explicit rule to ask early, woven into the context-capture turn (Milestone 2 path-a). Never as post-script closing the wow turn. (3) tour Milestone 7 url-path: hard rule against cascading Milestones 5/6 (PhantomOS intro + skill concept) immediately after the wow synthesis — re-pitching what PhantomOS is right after the wow dilutes it.

changes.reason: Step 7 add 'three movements + blank line' rule.
Milestone 3 ask-early rule. Milestone 7 ban on cascading Milestones 5/6 after wow.

operator_impact: Synthesis paragraph reads cleaner — three discrete movements visually scannable while staying prose-first. Blasé question lands at the right moment. Wow synthesis no longer gets diluted by reflexive PhantomOS re-pitch.
tested_on: phantom-stress live a wellness/cosmetic pilot run (S37) — three frictions observed + corrected
caught_by: Largo live observation on a wellness/cosmetic pilot run.
